# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# south Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions. Main Path A
#   wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
> south
# east Petting Zoo A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals.
> east
# take feed Taken.
> take feed
# feed goats You scatter some feed on the ground. The pygmy goats rush over,
#   bleating excitedly, and devour the corn and pellets in seconds.
> feed goats
# feed goats You've already fed them. They look contentedly full. *DING DONG*
#   "Attention visitors! The Willowbrook Family Zoo will be closing in three
#   hours.
> feed goats
# photograph goats You don't have a camera. There's one in the gift shop.
> photograph goats
# west Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> west
# west Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> west
# west Gift Shop A small zoo gift shop crammed with stuffed animals and
#   postcards. A large souvenir penny press machine stands near the door.
> west
# take camera Taken. *DING DONG* "Attention visitors! Two hours until closing.
#   Don't forget to stop by the gift shop for souvenirs!"
> take camera
# photograph postcards Click! You snap a photo of postcards. That one's going
#   on the fridge.
> photograph postcards
# east Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> east
# photograph toucan Click! You snap a photo of toucan. That one's going on the
#   fridge.
> photograph toucan
